mechanism_narrative: A sustained upward trend in real activity, proxied by rising retail sales, signals improving revenue expectations and raises S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value available for 2018-09-01 was 509041.0 at the 2018-10-15 decision point
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional base rate over any 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above its trailing 12-month high, tighter policy raises discount rates and reduces equity valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its trailing 12-month high
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2018-09-01 was 1.95 at the 2018-10-15 decision point
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered returns exceed the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When payroll employment rises while unemployment falls, labor demand confirms broad expansion and near-term earnings momentum, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2018-09-01 was 149500.0 and UNRATE was 3.7
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down condition has a 20-day forward return hit rate below 55% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A downside break in industrial production signals weakening production and inventory demand, lowering cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below its trailing 6-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2018-08-01 was 108.2317 at the 2018-10-15 decision point
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside breaks are not associated with below-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: A large decline in housing starts reduces expected construction activity, durable goods demand, and household formation spending, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2018-08-01 was 1282.0 at the 2018-10-15 decision point
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST declines are followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional median in more than half of all walk-forward instances.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer prices accelerate while the federal funds rate is rising, inflation pressure and policy tightening jointly raise discount-rate risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change > trailing 12-month change and FEDFUNDS 3-month change > 0
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2018-09-01 was 251.994 and FEDFUNDS was 1.95
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-acceleration and FEDFUNDS-up signal has nonnegative average 20-day forward returns after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals recession risk and weakening household income growth, causing investors to cut earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its trailing 12-month minimum by at least 0.3 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2018-09-01 was 3.7 at the 2018-10-15 decision point
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment rises are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of historical triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales rise while industrial production also rises, demand and supply confirm each other, reducing growth-scare risk and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:At the 2018-10-15 decision point, RSAFS and INDPRO had latest vintages for 2018-09-01 and 2018-08-01 respectively
failure_condition: Reject if the joint RSAFS-up and INDPRO-up condition fails to deliver a higher 5-day positive-return frequency than the unconditional sample frequency.
